title: Account settings
description: Manage your profile, preferences, and system settings.

overview.title: Account overview
overview.description: Summary of your account and system settings.

privacy.title: Privacy
privacy.description: Learn how your data is collected, used, and stored.
privacy.paragraph: This policy explains what information is stored in your account, how it is processed, and what rights you have over your personal data.

export.title: Export your data
export.description: Download a copy of your account data for backup, records, or transfer.

pdf.title: PDF summary
pdf.description: Download a readable summary of your account, settings, and activity for printing or sharing.

backup.title: Full backup (JSON)
backup.description: Download a complete backup of your data in JSON format for later restore.

security.title: Security
security.description: Manage your password and delete your account.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.description: Send a password reset email to your account email address.

deleteAccount.title: Delete account
deleteAccount.description: Enter your password to permanently delete your account.
deleteAccount.dayActiveMessage: End the day before deleting your account.

modal.title: Delete account
modal.description: This will permanently delete your account and all your data.

messages.deleteAccountDayActiveError: End the day before deleting your account.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.description: Manage language, currency, and how the app behaves.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Choose the default currency used across the app.

disableMotion.label: Reduce motion
disableMotion.description: Reduce animated transitions and motion effects throughout the app.

staffTicketPrinting.label: Staff ticket printing
staffTicketPrinting.description: Print the staff ticket sent to the kitchen or bar.

customerReceiptPrinting.label: Customer receipt printing
customerReceiptPrinting.description: Print the receipt for the customer.

discount.label: Discounts
discount.disabled: End the day before changing the discount setting

openingClosingBalance.label: Opening and closing balance
openingClosingBalance.description: Enable the opening and closing balance workflow.
openingClosingBalance.disabled: End the day before changing the balance setting

management.title: Data management
management.description: Permanently remove reports or archived data from the database.
management.dayActiveMsg: Destructive actions are disabled while a day is active.

clearReports.title: Clear reports and statistics
clearReports.description: Delete only reports and statistics data.

deleteArchivedItems.title: Delete all archived items
deleteArchivedItems.description: Permanently remove all archived menu and stock items.

deleteArchivedMenuItems.title: Delete archived menu items
deleteArchivedMenuItems.description: Permanently remove only archived menu items.

deleteArchivedStockItems.title: Delete archived stock items
deleteArchivedStockItems.description: Permanently remove only archived stock items.

resetAllData.title: Delete all database data
resetAllData.description: Permanently remove all data, including archived items.

discount.title: Discounts
discount.description: Manage the discounts available at checkout
discount.descriptionEndday: End the day before managing the discounts

modal.description: Create a discount that can be applied at checkout
modal.name: Name

select.descriptionFlat: Subtract a fixed value from the total
select.descriptionPercentage: Apply a percentage discount to the total

archiveModal.title: Archive discount
